publication_scope.notes: Shared law-school host; enforce the publication prefix.

evidence.notes: The publication path is not disallowed; standard Drupal administrative and search paths are disallowed.
Drupal landing page links the scoped /taxlawreview/issues page.

Page contains 12 accordion records across labeled current Volume 72 Issue 1 and upcoming Volumes 72-73, with title, byline, affiliation, and abstract text but no article landing or PDF links. Its discussion of the December 2017 tax law indicates stale issue content.

reconnaissance.notes: Metadata selectors are strong, but the route appears frozen around Volume 72-73 and exposes no acquisition path.

include: Tax Law Review print issue metadata under /taxlawreview/issues
scope.notes: Do not treat forthcoming entries as published holdings without a file or citation record.

entry_points.notes: Best scoped metadata seed, though stale.

nodes.notes: Flat issue headings and accordion metadata records.

archive_patterns.notes: No article or file URL pattern is exposed.

pagination.termination: Single response ends after Volume 73 Issue 2.

layout_eras.label: NYU Drupal issue metadata accordion
layout_eras.notes: Approximate era inferred from article abstracts and upcoming labels; publication year is not explicitly rendered and must be verified.

sources.example: Tax Benefit Complexity and Take-Up: Lessons from the Earned Income Tax Credit
by Jacob Goldin, Stanford Law School
sources.notes: Separate author names from affiliations; handle by and co-authored by.

sources.locator: dl.ckeditor-accordion > dd paragraphs after Abstract label
sources.example: Millions of low-income Americans fail to claim tax benefits for which they are eligible...

abstract.missingness: Most records contain prose; at least one says Abstract TBA.

year.notes: Do not infer a publication year from the crawl date.

sources.locator: nearest preceding h3 matching Volume {volume}, Issue {issue}
sources.notes: Associate each following dl until next h3.

sources.locator: nearest preceding h3 matching Volume {volume}, Issue {issue}

validation.notes: No PDF or article link was present, so no file request was made.

barriers.notes: The only issue page is stale and provides no article or PDF delivery route.

access.politeness_notes: Robots first; one homepage and one issue-page request; no file downloads.

verdict.summary: The Drupal issues page yields clean title, author, abstract, volume, and issue metadata, but appears frozen at Volumes 72-73, omits years, and has no article or PDF links.
blockers: Host is not mapped in the adapter registry
verdict.next_action: Locate the current publisher or repository archive and map www.law.nyu.edu to DrupalAdapter only if this stale metadata page remains useful.
verdict.recommended_adapter: DrupalAdapter (metadata-only until a current file archive is found)
verdict.implementation_notes: Seed /taxlawreview/issues, group dl.ckeditor-accordion records under nearest h3, and never mark forthcoming unlinked entries as acquired.
